daily.today_energy: Your vibe is giving thoughtful rebel energy. Mercury's got you in your feels about authenticity today—trust that voice in your head that's been whispering truth. This is your moment to get real.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, emotional honesty is the move rn. If someone's been on your mind, the universe is basically nudging you to have that conversation. No cryptic games, just genuine connection.
daily.career: Your ideas are actually hitting different today. That wild concept you've been sitting on? People are ready to hear it. Channel your innovative energy into something tangible—show up as your full self.
daily.health: Your nervous system is asking for stillness. Skip the overscheduling and give yourself permission to rest without guilt. Even 10 minutes of doing absolutely nothing hits reset on your whole energy.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about authenticity, Aquarius. The cosmos is nudging you to lean into what makes you uniquely you instead of dimming your light for anyone. Trust the weird.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, the vibe is about deeper conversations and real connections. Don't settle for surface-level energy—ask the questions that actually matter to you.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. This is the week to pitch that unconventional project or voice your perspective in meetings. Your innovative take is exactly what's needed.
weekly.health: Your nervous system might feel a bit activated—honor that by building in some grounding practices. Whether it's time outside or just sitting with your thoughts, make space for stillness.
